widget.name: GarlicFrame
widget.description: Web-Wrapper Widget for Garlic-Player. Opens any URL in an iframe and returns to the default playlist after a configurable idle timeout.
widget.author: GarlicSignage

preference.name: idle_timeout
preference.label: Idle Timeout (seconds)
preference.description: Seconds of inactivity before switching back to the default playlist.

preference.name: warn_at
preference.label: Warn Countdown (seconds)
preference.description: Show countdown overlay this many seconds before returning to playlist.

preference.name: show_overlay
preference.label: Show Overlay
preference.description: Show countdown overlay before returning to playlist (true/false).

preference.name: overlay_msg
preference.label: Overlay Message
preference.description: Text shown in the idle countdown overlay.

preference.name: player_host
preference.label: Player API Host
preference.description: Hostname or IP of the Garlic-Player REST API (usually localhost).

preference.name: player_port
preference.label: Player API Port
preference.description: Port of the Garlic-Player REST API.

preference.name: player_user
preference.label: Player API User
preference.description: Username for the Garlic-Player REST API.

preference.name: player_pass
preference.label: Player API Password
preference.description: Password for the Garlic-Player REST API (leave empty if none).
